metadata.notes: Computed from data/uc_ai_baseline.json by data/compute_derived.py. Three signals: maturity (entity x dimension, 0-4), RAI principle concordance (verbatim|adapted|absent across the 8 UC RAI Principles), and policy adoption timeline (regex extraction over notes text).
